title: pittosporum merrillianum
intro: Pittosporum merrillianum, also known as the Philippine cheesewood or Philippine pittosporum, is a species of flowering plant native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pittosporum merrillianum include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
